title: triticum durum grex orientale
intro: Triticum durum grex orientale, also known as Durum wheat, is a type of wheat plant that is native to the Mediterranean region and is known for its high protein content and hard, dense grains. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. The health benefits of consuming Triticum durum grex orientale include reducing the risk of anemia, improving cognitive function, and supporting healthy blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used to make bread, pasta, and other baked goods, as well as dietary supplements in the form of capsules or powders.
